name: employment_mutual_aid_request_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: employment mutual aid request marrowbridge lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. The vendor bridge ends at the top of the hour; after that, configuration changes require a full CAB and you lose the window. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs.

agents.name: Ansel Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Ansel Nielsen, the accountable decision-maker on this Employment bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Ansel Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Ansel Kowalski, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Ansel Nielsen must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Ansel Nielsen do?
